questionHtml:
A metal cube X of length L is heated gaining thermal energy Q. Its temperature rises by ΔT. A second cube Y, of length 2L, made of the same material, gains thermal energy of 2Q.

What is the temperature rise of Y?


A.  ΔT8

B.  ΔT4

C.  ΔT

D.  2ΔT

meta.title: A metal cube X of length L is heated gaining thermal energy Q. Its temperature rises by ΔT. A second cube Y, of length 2L, made of the same material, gains thermal energy of 2Q. Wh
